scripts.dev: npm run db:up && npm run db:migrate && npm --prefix frontend exec concurrently -- -k -n backend,frontend -c cyan,green "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
scripts.dev:backend: npm run db:up && npm run db:migrate && npm --prefix backend run dev
scripts.db:migrate: DATABASE_URL="postgresql://clocket:clocket@127.0.0.1:5433/clocket_dev?schema=public" DIRECT_URL="postgresql://clocket:clocket@127.0.0.1:5433/clocket_dev?schema=public" npm --prefix backend exec prisma migrate deploy
scripts.docker:migrate: docker compose exec backend npm run prisma:migrate:dev
